subject: Super Saiyan warrior in extreme close-up, golden aura and lightning, intense forward gaze
suspected_ip: Son Goku (Dragon Ball Z / Dragon Ball Super)
description: An extreme close-up of a Super Saiyan figure's face and upper chest dominates the frame. The hair is raised in the classic spiky Super Saiyan form with a brilliant golden-yellow aura and crackling lightning energy radiating outward from the body. The forward-facing gaze is fierce and focused. The energy intensity is extreme — the card background is almost entirely washed in white and gold light. No weapon is visible; this is pure power-aura as the visual subject.
foreground: Super Saiyan face and upper torso with golden aura and lightning
